Class Food

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.StillEntity
ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8.Food
public class Food extends StillEntity
Represents a collectible food item in the game. When collected, it provides a health bonus to the player. The food item also moves to a new random walkable position periodically.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class StillEntity

    position

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    Food(Position position)
    Constructs a Food object at a specified position.

    Marks the food item as collected and applies the health bonus to the player.

    Draws the food item on the game screen if it has not been collected.

  • Constructor Details

    • Food

      public Food(Position position)
      Constructs a Food object at a specified position.
      Parameters:
      position - The initial position of the food item on the game map.

  • Method Details

    • collect

      public void collect(Player player)
      Marks the food item as collected and applies the health bonus to the player. If the food is already collected, the method does nothing.
      Parameters:
      player - The player object collecting the food. Can be null.

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics2D g2, int tileSize)
      Draws the food item on the game screen if it has not been collected.
      Parameters:
      g2 - The Graphics2D context used for drawing.
      tileSize - The size of a single tile on the game screen, used for scaling the food image.

    • isCollected

      public boolean isCollected()
      Checks if the food item has been collected.
      Returns:
      true if the food item has been collected, false otherwise.

    • blocksMovement

      public boolean blocksMovement()
      Determines if the food item blocks player movement.
      Overrides:
      blocksMovement in class StillEntity
      Returns:
      false as food items do not block movement.

    • update

      public void update(GamePanel gp)
      Updates the food item's state. If the move interval has passed, the food item moves to a new random position and becomes uncollected.
      Parameters:
      gp - The GamePanel instance, used to access tile information and map boundaries.
